rule_description: exact duplicate customer_ids exist in source data
email is missing or absent for a customer
suggested_action: Contact the customer to obtain a valid email address and update the source record; flag account for manual outreach

rule_description: country or state value is non-standard (full name or variant spelling)
exact duplicate order_ids exist in source data
order references a customer_id not present in the customers dataset
suggested_action: Verify and correct the customer_id on the order; quarantine the order for manual review if the customer cannot be found

rule_description: order references a product_id not present in the products dataset
suggested_action: Verify and correct the product_id on the order; mark for review if the product cannot be identified

rule_description: completed order has a non-positive quantity
suggested_action: Investigate for data-entry error; correct the quantity or reclassify the order status (e.g. returned or cancelled)

rule_description: stated order_total does not match quantity x unit_price
suggested_action: Reconcile the order total with line-item pricing; escalate discrepancy to finance for adjustment or repricing

rule_description: payment references an order_id not present in the orders dataset
suggested_action: Trace the orphan payment to its correct order; link or initiate a finance write-off if unresolvable

rule_description: settled payment amount differs from the completed order total
suggested_action: Reconcile the settled amount with the order total; initiate a payment adjustment or chargeback as appropriate

rule_description: ticket created_ts cannot be parsed to a valid timestamp
suggested_action: Correct the malformed timestamp in the source system; enforce ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS) at ticket creation

rule_description: ticket references a customer_id not present in the customers dataset
suggested_action: Verify the customer reference on the ticket; link to the correct customer or create a new customer record

rule_description: different customer_ids resolve to the same person via name and contact-info matching
suggested_action: Verify the diplicates via the id_crosswalk table; currently it has been updated using the most complete or if both complete, the lowest customer_key

rule_description: order references a product with active_flag = 0 (discontinued product)
suggested_action: Remove the inactive product from the order or reactivate the product; verify fulfilment capability and review pricing before shipment
